zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne de NEVERS於大約1110年出生在法國布格尼艾福內維斯時，她的父親Guillaume de Nevers83歲，母親Ermengarde Tonnerre87歲。她於大約1130年與Guillaume VIII d'AUVERGNE在法國奧維結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1147年9月3日在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯普-德-o可勒爾蒙吉福藍德享年38歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne de NEVERS于大约1110年出生在法国布格尼艾福內維斯时，她的父亲Guillaume de Nevers83岁，母亲Ermengarde Tonnerre87岁。她于大约1130年与Guillaume VIII d'AUVERGNE在法国奧維结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1147年9月3日在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯普-德-o可勒爾蒙吉福藍德享年38岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: NEVERS
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: habitational name from the city of Nevers in France.
Possibly an altered form of English Nevard or perhaps of its extinct variant Neverd. The surname Nevers is also found in Jamaica.

History: The majority of the American bearers of this surname trace their origin to Richard Nevers, born in 1666 in Woburn, MA. His origin is not known, but his surname is also documented in the forms Nevard and Neverds, which make it possible that Richard Nevers was of English origin.

variants.name: Nevard
meanings: English: from the Middle English (Old French) personal name Nevard, from ancient Germanic Niwhard, from niw- ‘new’ + hard- ‘strong, hardy’. Compare Nevers .

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

variants.name: Anni
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

en.lifeSummary: When Anne de NEVERS was born about 1110, in Nevers, Nièvre, Burgundy, France, her father, Guillaume de Nevers, was 83 and her mother, Ermengarde Tonnerre, was 87. She married Guillaume VIII d'AUVERGNE about 1130, in Auvergne, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died on 3 September 1147, in Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, at the age of 38.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne de NEVERS est née environ 1110, à Nevers, Nièvre, Bourgogne, France, son père, Guillaume de Nevers, avait 83 ans et sa mère, Ermengarde Tonnerre, avait 87 ans. Elle a épousé Guillaume VIII d'AUVERGNE environ 1130, à Auvergne, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 3 septembre 1147, à Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, à l’âge de 38 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anne de NEVERS um 1110 in Nevers, Nièvre, Burgund, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Guillaume de Nevers 83 und ihre Mutter Ermengarde Tonnerre 87. Sie hat um 1130 in Auvergne, Frankreich Guillaume VIII d'AUVERGNE geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 3. September 1147 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne de NEVERS è nata il circa 1110 nel Nevers, Nièvre, Bourgogne, Francia, sua padre, Guillaume de Nevers, aveva 83 anni e sua madre, Ermengarde Tonnerre, aveva 87 anni. Lei sposato Guillaume VIII d'AUVERGNE circa 1130, nel Auvergne, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì il 3 settembre 1147, nel Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, all'età di 38 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne de NEVERSが約1110年にフランスボウルゴグンニevアネバーズで生まれた時，父Guillaume de Neversは83歳，母Ermengarde Tonnerreは87歳であった。約1130年にフランスアウバーグンでGuillaume VIII d'AUVERGNEと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1147年9月3日にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスプウイ-デ-ドoメクラーモント-フエランドで38歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne de NEVERS(이)가 대략 1110년 프랑스 부르고그니 니e브르 네버스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Guillaume de Nevers(은)는 83세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ermengarde Tonnerre(은)는 87세였다. 그녀는 대략 1130년 프랑스 오버그니에서 Guillaume VIII d'AUVERGNE(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1147년 9월 3일 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 푸이-데-드o 클레몽-페랜드에서 38세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne de NEVERS nasceu aproximadamente 1110, em Nevers, Nièvre, Bourgogne, França, seu pai, Guillaume de Nevers, tinha 83 anos e sua mãe, Ermengarde Tonnerre, tinha 87 anos. Ela casou-se com Guillaume VIII d'AUVERGNE aproximadamente 1130, em Auvergne, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 3 de setembro de 1147, em Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França, com 38 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne de NEVERS родилась около 1110 г. в местности нивирс, ниeвр, бургогн, Франция, её отцу по имени Guillaume de Nevers было 83 года, а матери, которую звали Ermengarde Tonnerre, 87. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Guillaume VIII d'AUVERGNE около 1130 г. в местности аувиргн, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла 3 сентября 1147 г. в местности клирмонт-фирранд, пуи-де-дoм, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция в возрасте 38 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anne de NEVERS nació aproximadamente 1110, en Nevers, Nièvre, Bourgogne, Francia, su papá, Guillaume de Nevers, tenía 83 años y su mamá, Ermengarde Tonnerre, tenía 87 años. Se casó con Guillaume VIII d'AUVERGNE aproximadamente 1130, en Auvergne, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió el 3 de septiembre de 1147, en Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, a la edad de 38 años.
